subject: [PATCH v5 2/9] mm/memory_hotplug: pass online_type to online_memory_block() via arg

reviews.author: Gupta, Pankaj
reviews.summary: Pankaj Gupta reviewed the patch and gave it a Reviewed-by tag without providing any specific feedback or concerns.

2026-06-24.patch_summary: This patch modifies the `online_memory_block()` function to accept an online type through its argument, rather than using a default value. This change allows callers to specify explicit online types and prepares for future modifications.
